title: Code-Split Heavy Dependencies (CodeMirror, react-markdown, @dnd-kit)
description:
## Problem
Several heavy third-party libraries are statically imported and bundled into the main JavaScript payload, even though they're only used by specific components that may not be visible on initial load.

## Heavy Dependencies Currently Statically Imported

### CodeMirror (~200KB) - Syntax highlighting/editing:
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/json-syntax-editor.tsx` (lines 1-6)
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/shell-syntax-editor.tsx` (lines 1-6)
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/xml-syntax-editor.tsx` (lines 1-5)
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/dialogs/code-editor-window.tsx` (lines 2-13)

Imports:
```typescript
import CodeMirror from '@uiw/react-codemirror';
import { StreamLanguage } from '@codemirror/language';
import { javascript } from '@codemirror/legacy-modes/mode/javascript';
```

### react-markdown + rehype (~50-100KB) - Markdown rendering:
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/markdown.tsx` (lines 1-3)

### @dnd-kit (~40KB) - Drag and drop:
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view.tsx` (lines 4-11)
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/kanban-board.tsx` (lines 2-3)

### @xyflow/react (if still used) - Flow diagrams:
- Listed in `package.json` dependencies but graph-view files have been deleted
- May be a candidate for removal entirely

## Good Existing Pattern
xterm is ALREADY dynamically imported in:
- `terminal-panel.tsx` (lines 551-569)
- `xterm-log-viewer.tsx` (lines 96-125)
This is the correct pattern to follow.

## Required Changes

### 1. Dynamic Import for CodeMirror Editors
- Create lazy wrapper components for each CodeMirror editor
- Only load CodeMirror when the user opens a code editor or syntax view
- Show a simple textarea fallback while CodeMirror loads

### 2. Dynamic Import for Markdown Renderer
- Create a lazy `<MarkdownContent>` wrapper
- Show raw text or a loading skeleton while markdown renderer loads
- Consider if agent output markdown should pre-load since it's commonly used

### 3. Evaluate @dnd-kit Usage
- @dnd-kit is used for kanban drag-and-drop, which IS a core feature
- Consider if it can be deferred until the first drag interaction
- Or accept it as a necessary dependency and focus on other optimizations

### 4. Remove @xyflow/react If Unused
- Graph view files have been deleted (see git status: `D apps/ui/src/components/views/graph-view/`)
- If @xyflow/react is no longer used anywhere, remove it from dependencies

## Pattern to Follow (from xterm)
```typescript
// Lazy CodeMirror wrapper
const CodeMirrorEditor = lazy(() => import('@uiw/react-codemirror'));

function JsonSyntaxEditor({ value, onChange, ...props }) {
  return (
    <Suspense fallback={<textarea value={value} onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)} className="..." />}>
      <CodeMirrorEditor value={value} onChange={onChange} extensions={[json()]} {...props} />
    </Suspense>
  );
}
```

## Files to Modify
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/json-syntax-editor.tsx` - Lazy load CodeMirror
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/shell-syntax-editor.tsx` - Lazy load CodeMirror
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/xml-syntax-editor.tsx` - Lazy load CodeMirror
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/dialogs/code-editor-window.tsx` - Lazy load CodeMirror
- `apps/ui/src/components/ui/markdown.tsx` - Consider lazy wrapper
- `apps/ui/package.json` - Remove @xyflow/react if unused

## Expected Impact
- Initial bundle reduced by 200-340KB (CodeMirror + markdown + potentially @xyflow)
- Faster Time-to-Interactive since heavy parsers load on demand
- Code editors still work but have brief loading state on first open

## Acceptance Criteria
- CodeMirror only loads when a syntax editor is first opened (visible in Network tab)
- Fallback textarea works during CodeMirror load
- Markdown content renders correctly after lazy load
- @xyflow/react removed from dependencies if graph view is deleted
- No functional regressions in any editor or renderer
- Bundle analyzer shows separate chunks for CodeMirror, markdown, etc.

## Reference
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/terminal-view/terminal-panel.tsx` (lines 551-569) - Good example of xterm dynamic import

descriptionHistory.description: Code-split heavy dependencies (CodeMirror, react-markdown, @xyflow) using dynamic imports and lazy loading

tasks.description: Remove @xyflow/react and dagre from package.json dependencies
Convert JsonSyntaxEditor to lazy-loaded wrapper with Suspense fallback
Convert ShellSyntaxEditor to lazy-loaded wrapper with Suspense fallback
Convert XmlSyntaxEditor to lazy-loaded wrapper with Suspense fallback
Convert CodeEditorWindow to lazy-loaded wrapper with Suspense fallback
Convert Markdown component to lazy-loaded wrapper with Suspense fallback
Update dialogs barrel export for lazy CodeEditorWindow
Run TypeScript build to verify no type errors
Run package tests to verify no regressions
